nasb.text: Now Gaal the son of Ebed went out and stood in the entrance of the city gate; and Abimelech and the people who were with him arose from the ambush.

esv.text: And Gaal the son of Ebed went out and stood in the entrance of the gate of the city, and Abimelech and the people who were with him rose from the ambush.

cnv.text: 以別的兒子迦勒出去，站在城門口；亞比米勒和與他在一起的人，從埋伏的地方起來。

ccb.text: 早晨，以别的儿子迦勒出来站在城门口时，亚比米勒带领部下从埋伏的地方冲了出来。
